top_signals.title: A £3bn reckoning that will reshape buy now, pay later
top_signals.summary: Buy now, pay later providers are cheering the arrival of new regulations.In this week’s column Samuel Norman considers how the industry could be reshaped.  Five years ago, the government revealed plans to crack down on the buy now, pay later market after an industry review found financial risks posed by the ease with which consumers [...]

top_signals.title: Trump pays E. Jean Carroll $5.6 million in sexual abuse case
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump on July 6 asked the Supreme Court justices to take the unusual step of reconsidering their rejection of his appeal, with no decision yet made.
